---
title: "Kolekti"
description: |
  A webpage to gather information from labor informality in Ecuador. The goal was to create a community where people could interact and generate work opportunities. 
categories: 
  - 🏘️Social sciences
  - 🌐Web development
date: "2021-02-02"
image: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/kolekti.png
draft: false
---

[{{< iconify icon-park-outline web-page >}} Website][kolekti_website]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill >}} Slides (Spanish)][slides]{.btn target=_blank}
[{{< fa blog >}} Blog post (Spanish)][blog_spanish]{.btn target=_blank}

This project was developed as the result of the Innovation challenge *For more data on labor informality* hackathon, organized by [Datalat][datalat], [PNUD Ecuador][pnud_ecuador], [UN Women Ecuador][un_women_ecuador], and [the International Labour Organization][ilo].

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/kolekti.png" width="600" title="AMP">
</p>

## The hackathon  

The Innovation challenge *For more data on labor informality* hackathon searched for a **technological solution to collect labor informality data in Ecuador**. In the first stage of this challenge, there were 39 proposals from 80 interdisciplinary teams.

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/reto_inf.JPG" width="600" title="AMP">
</p>

Then, three finalists teams were selected to create a prototype of the idea for one month. 

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/reto_inf_finalistas.JPG" width="600" title="AMP">
</p>

## Our solution 

**Kolekti** was meant to be a friendly and innovative webpage that gathered information from workers in labor informality and employers, creating a community where all people could interact with each other and generating suitable work opportunities.

In this way, we created a different way to collect and share data. Kolekti’s architecture was based on two main data management schemes: **Open Data** and **Data Privacy**. The information would not only be available to everyone and give valuable insight, but it would also be protected, it would be anonymous and the people who voluntarily share their data, will receive a lot of benefits. These advantages included access to courses, events, informative blogs, a job portal, and a forum. The only thing we asked from the users in return was their employment status information.

Our solution was able to present **reliable and up-to date information about the labor situation in Ecuador**, and at the same time, it created a community in which people can learn, meet other people, solve their doubts and maybe even motivate themselves enough to start their own businesses.

With this technological solution we were the winners of this hackathon . 

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/reto_inf_winner.JPG" width="600" title="AMP">
</p>

In addition, our project was selected to be presented at the [YouthLead Innovation Festival][youthlead], organized by the United Nations offices. 

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/youthlead.jpeg" width="600" title="AMP">
</p>

This event gathered innovative youth-led solutions for the achievement of the Sustainable Development Goals and recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic. Kolekti was part of the Digital Technology Session of this event. 

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sayalaruano/sayalaruano.github.io/HEAD/images/Kolekti/kolekti_youthlead.png" width="600" title="AMP">
</p>

## Additional information 

If you want to check out our webpage, it is available at this [link][kolekti_website]. Also, this [blog in Spanish][blog_spanish] has a detailed explanation of the challenge.

[datalat]: https://www.datalat.org/
[pnud_ecuador]: https://www.ec.undp.org/content/ecuador/es/home.html
[un_women_ecuador]: https://ecuador.unwomen.org/en
[ilo]: https://www.ilo.org/global/lang--en/index.htm
[kolekti_website]: https://kolekti-304615.web.app/
[youthlead]: https://www.un.org/youthenvoy/youthlead-innovation-festival-thematic-sessions/
[blog_spanish]: https://www.ec.undp.org/content/ecuador/es/home/blog/2021/sin-miedo-a-intentar-algo-nuevo-reto-de-innovacion-por-mas-datos.html
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7536703
